productDisplayName: Nike Men As Woven Shor White Shorts
description: Composition White shorts made of 100% polyester, with in-built boxers and has an elastic waist with drawcord Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Built with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit athletes demands for focus, these nike running shorts come in a front-to-back color-block design, including hi-vis features for night workouts. These high-performance shorts feature a supportive two-in-one cut built with fabric that rapidly moves sweat away from the body.
